verses.text: God is known in Judah, His dwelling in Salem, where He broke the weapons of war. His presence is His people's defence. Where God dwells, He shatters the arms raised against Him.
God is known in Judah, His dwelling in Salem, where He broke the weapons of war. His presence is His people's defence. Where God dwells, He shatters the arms raised against Him.
God is known in Judah, His dwelling in Salem, where He broke the weapons of war. His presence is His people's defence. Where God dwells, He shatters the arms raised against Him.
More glorious than mountains of prey, at His rebuke horse and chariot lie stunned in death. The mightiest forces fail before Him. One word of God stills the proudest army.
More glorious than mountains of prey, at His rebuke horse and chariot lie stunned in death. The mightiest forces fail before Him. One word of God stills the proudest army.
More glorious than mountains of prey, at His rebuke horse and chariot lie stunned in death. The mightiest forces fail before Him. One word of God stills the proudest army.
He alone is to be feared; who can stand when He is angry? He arose 'to save all the meek of the earth.' His judgment rescues the lowly. The wrath that terrifies the proud is salvation to the humble.
He alone is to be feared; who can stand when He is angry? He arose 'to save all the meek of the earth.' His judgment rescues the lowly. The wrath that terrifies the proud is salvation to the humble.
He alone is to be feared; who can stand when He is angry? He arose 'to save all the meek of the earth.' His judgment rescues the lowly. The wrath that terrifies the proud is salvation to the humble.

Even 'the wrath of man shall praise' Him, the rest He restrains; so men should vow and pay to the LORD, who cuts off the spirit of princes. He turns rage to His glory. The God who tames human fury is rightly feared by kings.
